arts.ttl: When could Liverpool seal Premier League title?
arts.sum: Liverpool's march to the Premier League title seems inevitable now after they increase their lead at the top of the table to 15 points. When could they be confirmed as champions?

arts.ttl: If Liverpool manage to overcome Paris Saint-Germain then Arne Slot will be charging towards immortality
arts.sum: Arne Slot stands within touching distance of immortality. You might not know it when observing the cool, calm and collected demeanour he often possesses.

arts.ttl: West Ham 0-1 Newcastle: Highlights, man of the match as Magpies win in warm-up for Liverpool EFL Cup showdown
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes scores the decisive goal to guide the Magpies to a 1-0 victory against West Ham United at the London Stadium.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique Reveals Ultra Focused Mindset PSG Will Have Against Liverpool to Overturn Deficit
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain heads to Anfield full of confidence after a dominant 4-1 win over Stade Rennais on Saturday at Roazhon Park. The match remained scoreless until the 27th minute when Bradley Barcola broke the deadlock to give PSG a 1-0 lead. arts.ttl: Liverpool release statement as sexually inappropriate comments allegation made after FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The football club have released a statement following their FA Cup clash with Arsenal at the weekend

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Arsenal and Man City statement ahead of PSG Champions League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Paris Saint-Germain to Anfield on Tuesday in the second leg of their Champions League tie looking to earn progress into the competition's quarter-final stage

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Mo Salah leading Barcelona star as Europe’s assist leader
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona trails only one player when it comes to assists in Europe’s top-5 leagues this season. The Barca star…

arts.ttl: Only Liverpool’s best will be enough to beat ‘complete’ PSG, warns Arne Slot
arts.sum: Head coach ready for second-leg showdown at Anfield Luis Enrique says winners of last-16 tie will make final Arne Slot believes Liverpool must produce their best performance of the season to finish off “a complete” Paris Saint-Germain team that gave him sleepless nights after the Champions League encounter last week. Liverpool take a 1-0 lead into the last-16 second leg at Anfield but Slot rates the tie at “50-50” on the evidence of PSG’s display at Parc des Princes. “The result was ours, the performance was for them,” he said. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Paris Saint-Germain are giving him sleepless nights and insists Liverpool must up their game to progress in Champions League
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he is having sleepless nights ahead of the visit of PSG and insists Liverpool must put in their performance of the season to progress in the Champions League last-16 second leg.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool plotting move for ‘superb’ Premier League player praised by Guardiola
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on the Premier League title as they sit on top of the table, 15 points ahead of 2nd placed Arsenal. They are also in the League Cup final, with a clash against Newcastle scheduled to be played at Wembley coming Sunday.
